results.title: AWS Summit New York 2026: New ways to make AI agents more effective at work
results.description: Today at AWS Summit New York, I shared insights into how agents are being put to work effectively and how they create momentum across global organizations. I also showed the new innovations that are helping you get there, including AWS Continuum, a new AI-native security service, and AWS Context, a knowledge graph that gives agents access to the context they need to do their best work, along with new innovations across Amazon Quick, Kiro, AWS DevOps Agent, AWS Transform, and Amazon Bedrock AgentCore.
